history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is an empty floor cell, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the row of the goal. Turning is unnecessary right now, and moving into lava must be avoided.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right, but I am currently facing the wall directly in front of me at row 06 column C. Moving forward is impossible. The cell to my right at row 07 column E is lava, so I should not turn right to head that way. The safe adjacent open cell is to my left at row 07 column B? Actually that area is unseen, while the known safe path is the open floor at row 06 column D, which I can reach by turning left first and then moving later. So the best immediate action is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The cells to my left and right on row 07 are both open floor, and no goal is visible yet. I will turn right to face a safe open cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right, but I am facing a wall directly in front of me at row 06 column C. Moving forward is impossible. Turning right would face lava immediately, while turning left would let me reorient toward the safe open cell on my left side. So the safest useful next step is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. Both left and right adjacent cells on my current row are open floor, but I need to choose a turn first. I will turn right to face the open cell at row 07 column E.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is free floor, while the cells to the right include lava and the goal is visible further ahead to the right. The safest immediate progress is to move forward onto the empty cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall at row 06 column D, so moving forward is blocked. To my right, row 07 column E is a safe floor cell, and the goal is further to the right at row 07 column F. Turning right will orient me toward the open path and the visible goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead of me by two cells in the same column. The cell immediately in front is a safe floor tile, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead of me at row 06 column D. The cell in front is the goal and is safe to enter, so I should move forward immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
